nodes.name: 马德雷德迪奥斯大区
nodes.summary: 马德雷德迪奥斯大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联17种鸟类，包括Fiery-capped manakin、Purple-throated cotinga、Marble-faced bristle tyrant等17种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 库斯科大区
nodes.summary: 库斯科大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联45种鸟类，包括高山斑䳍、闪羽蜂鸟、秘鲁斑尾蜂鸟等45种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Selva cacique
nodes.summary: Selva cacique（Selva cacique，学名 Cacicus koepckeae），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于乌卡亚利大区、库斯科大区、马德雷德迪奥斯大区，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 乌卡亚利大区
nodes.summary: 乌卡亚利大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括红紋鬚鴷、Fiery-capped manakin、Fiery-throated fruiteater等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Selva cacique is endemic to eastern Peru where it is found in the regions of Ucayali, Cusco and Madre de Dios, and the adjoining Acre State in northwestern Brazil

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Selva cacique is endemic to eastern Peru where it is found in the regions of Ucayali, Cusco and Madre de Dios, and the adjoining Acre State in northwestern Brazil

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Selva cacique is endemic to eastern Peru where it is found in the regions of Ucayali, Cusco and Madre de Dios, and the adjoining Acre State in northwestern Brazil

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is an uncommon and elusive bird and it is threatened by habitat destruction; the population is thought to be declining rapidly and the International Union for Conservation of Nature has assessed the bird's conservation status as being "Near Threatened"
